cards.name: Bloody Baron
cards.flavorText: The Bloody Baron's the only one who can control him [Peeves], he won't even listen to us Prefects - Percy Weasley
effect: Once per game, you may discard 3 cards from your hand to choose an opponent's card in play and discard it

cards.name: Forest Flying Car
cards.flavorText: The sides of the car were scratched and smeared with mud. Apparently it had taken to trundling around the forest on its own
effect:
To play this card, discard at least 1 of your Creatures or Characters from play. This card costs 2 less Power to play for each card you discarded.
When you play this card, do 2 damage to an opponent for each card discarded from play for this effect.

cards.name: Peeves, Picking on Ickle Firsties
cards.flavorText: Peeves the Poltergeist was worth two locked doors and a trick staircase if you met him when you were late for class
effect: Once per turn, you may use an Action to draw 3 cards. An opponent may prevent this by taking 3 damage.

cards.name: Prongs
effect:
Play this card only if you have at least 5 Lessons in play.
This card's damage per turn is equal to the number of Marauder cards you have in play. When you play this card, do damage to an opponent equal to its damage per turn.

cards.name: The Man With Two Faces
effect:
If this card is your starting Character, it has both effects. Otherwise, when you play this card, choose one:
-The first Dark card you play each turn does not require Power that matches.
-Once per game, you may return all Events and Adventures in play to their owners' hands.

cards.name: Filch's Office
effect:
All Characters lose all abilities. 
Before each player's turn, they may discard 2 of their cards from their hand and/or that they control from play. If they do, this card has no effect until the end of this turn.

cards.name: Late Night Patrol
effect: Your opponent cannot play non-Lesson cards that share a card type with another card they played that turn. Solve: Your opponent skips a total of 5 Actions. Reward: Your opponent may draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Moste Potente Potions
effect: Before your turn, you may discard this card from play. If you do, choose up to 2 of an opponent's cards in play. Until the beginning of your next turn, those cards lose all abilities.

cards.name: Out of Bounds 3rd Floor
cards.flavorText:
"And finally, I must tell you that this year, the third-floor corridor on the right-hand side is out of bounds to everyone who does not wish to die a very painful death."
— Albus Dumbledore
effect: Whenever a player plays a Location card, discard that Location after discarding this one.

cards.name: Rivals
effect:
When you play this card, choose a card type. Whenever you take damage from a card of the chosen type, you may prevent up to 2 of that damage and put that many counters on this card. 

If this card has 10 or more counters on it, it no longer prevents damage and instead when an opponent's card does damage to you, you may discard this card to prevent that damage.

cards.name: Sorting Ceremony
effect:
This card does not require Power that matches to play.
Before each of your turns, you may choose 1 of the following keywords you have in play:
Gryffindor - Draw 2 cards
Hufflepuff - Put up to 2 non-Healing cards from your discard pile on the bottom of your deck
Ravenclaw - Your cards need 2 less Power to play this turn
Slytherin - Do 2 damage to an opponent

cards.name: Boatride to Hogwarts
cards.flavorText: The little boats carried them through a curtain of ivy which hid a wide opening in the cliff face. "
effect: At the end of each opponent's turn, if they chose to not use all of their available Actions, you may choose 1 of their cards in play and discard it.

cards.name: First to Rise, First to Die
cards.flavorText:
"Never forget that when thirteen dine together, the first to rise will be the first to die!"
— Sybill Trelawney
effect: Whenever an opponent uses any Actions to play the second card that shares a card type with another card they played that turn, do 5 damage to them.

cards.name: Followed by Cho
effect: Do 5 damage to an opponent. Then they choose 1 of their non-Lesson cards in play. That card loses all abilities until the beginning of your next turn.

cards.name: Harry vs Draco
effect:
To play this card, discard 3 Lesson cards from your hand.
Do 8 damage to an opponent.

cards.name: Lockhart's Cupids
effect:
Choose a Character in play. It loses all abilities until the beginning of your next turn.
Prevent all damage done to you by Creatures until your next turn.

cards.name: Meeting Charlie
effect: Choose a Creature in play. Draw cards equal to half of its printed Power cost (rounded up). Then the owner of that Creature draws 2 cards. Then shuffle that Creature into its owner's deck.

cards.name: Meeting on the Train
cards.flavorText: “Are you really Harry Potter?” - Ron Weasley
effect:
Whenever an opponent uses any Actions to play a card, you may put a counter on this card.
You may use an Action to discard this card from play. If you do, shuffle cards up to half the number of counters on this card from your discard pile into your deck (rounded up).

cards.name: Ron's Knightly Protection
cards.flavorText: “That’s chess!” snapped Ron. "“You’ve got to make some sacrifices! I’ll make my move and she’ll take me — that leaves you free to checkmate the king, Harry!”
effect: At the beginning of each opponents' turn, if they have more Power than you, their cards need 2 more Power to play until the end of their turn.

cards.name: Unconscious Troll
cards.flavorText: “I’m glad we didn’t have to fight that one,” Harry whispered as they stepped carefully over one of its massive legs.
effect: Whenever you discard the second card you control from play each turn, this card does 3 ddamage to an opponent.
